action.reasoning: Observation: The 20-epoch hidden_dim=512 GRU improved hidden AUC from 0.7527 to 0.7637; validation best occurred at epoch 13 and curves show train loss continuing down while val loss mostly plateaued, so single-model overfitting starts early. Analysis: A low-risk next improvement is checkpoint ensembling across random seeds/dropout settings; this often improves AUC without changing the validated prediction contract, and the measured runtime leaves enough budget for a multi-seed run. Decision: update train/predict to support ensemble checkpoints, then train three moderately regularized GRU-DKT models and submit the averaged ensemble.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 15 --hidden_dim 512 --emb_dim 128 --dropout 0.2 --lr 0.001 --weight_decay 0.0001 --batch_size 128 --seeds 42,123,777 && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output smoke_predictions.json
